description: This script manages database schema migrations and seed data for the Recipe Hub project. It handles applying SQL migration files and seed data idempotently, ensuring the schema_migrations table exists, and executing SQL commands via psql with a connection specified in an external file.

methods.name: psql_exec
methods.description: Executes a SQL command via the psql connection defined in db_connection.txt, with error stopping enabled.

methods.name: psql_file
methods.description: Executes SQL commands from a file via psql with the connection details.

methods.name: ensure_migrations_table
methods.description: Creates the schema_migrations table and the citext extension if they do not exist, preparing for migration tracking.

methods.name: apply_migration_if_needed
methods.description: Checks if a migration version has already been applied; if not, applies the migration SQL file and records it in schema_migrations.

methods.name: run_up
methods.description: Runs the schema migrations in order by applying the 001_init.sql migration if not already applied.

methods.name: run_seed
methods.description: Applies seed data from schema/seed.sql, ensuring idempotence.

calls: psql -t -A -q -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "SELECT 1 FROM schema_migrations WHERE version='${version}' LIMIT 1;"
create extension if not exists citext
create table if not exists schema_migrations (version text primary key, applied_at timestamptz not null default now())
